zh.lifeSummary: 當King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien於1423年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯時，他的父親King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomond28歲，母親Catherine De Burgh27歲。他於1440年與Annabelle de Burke在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1466年4月在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯享年43歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯恩尼斯 1。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien于1423年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯时，他的父亲King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomond28岁，母亲Catherine De Burgh27岁。他于1440年与Annabelle de Burke在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1466年4月在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯享年43岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 克萊爾恩尼斯恩尼斯 1。

nameMeanings.name: O'Brien
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Dermot, Liam, Brigid, Declan, Donovan, John Patrick, Kieran, Colm, Donal, Brennan, Caitlin.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Briain ‘descendant of Brian’, a personal name probably based on the element bre- ‘hill’, with the transferred sense ‘eminence’, i.e. ‘exalted one’. See also Bryan . In Ireland there has also been some confusion with O'Byrne (see Byrne ).
History: This name is borne in particular by one of the greatest of Irish septs, descendants of Brian Boru, who rose to the high kingship of Ireland in 1002.

nameMeanings.name: Tadg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name, pronounced ‘tyg’, originally a byname meaning ‘poet’ or ‘philosopher’; a very common given name throughout the Middle Ages. It is sometimes Anglicized as Tim.

variants.name: Teague
meanings: Anglicized form of   Tadhg .

variants.name: Tad
meanings: Normally an Anglicized form of Gaelic Tadhg , but sometimes a short form of   Thaddeus .  It is also used as an independent given name, especially in America.

variants.name: Teigue
meanings: Traditional name, pronounced ‘tyg’, originally a byname meaning ‘poet’ or ‘philosopher’; a very common given name throughout the Middle Ages. It is sometimes Anglicized as Tim.

en.lifeSummary: When King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien was born in 1423, in Ennis, County Clare, Ireland, his father, King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomond, was 28 and his mother, Catherine De Burgh, was 27. He married Annabelle de Burke in 1440, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died in April 1466, in Ennis, County Clare, Ireland, at the age of 43, and was buried in Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien est né en 1423, à Ennis, County Clare, Irlande, son père, King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomond, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Catherine De Burgh, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Annabelle de Burke en 1440, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en avril 1466, à Ennis, County Clare, Irlande, à l’âge de 43 ans, et a été enterré à Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien 1423 in Ennis, County Clare, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomond 28 und seine Mutter Catherine De Burgh 27. Er hat 1440 in Irland Annabelle de Burke geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb im April 1466 im Alter von 43 Jahren in Ennis, County Clare, Irland und wurde in Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien è nato il nel 1423 nel Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, il suo padre, King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomond, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Catherine De Burgh, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Annabelle de Burke nel 1440, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel aprile 1466, nel Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, all'età di 43 anni, e fu sepolto a Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brienが1423年にアイルランドコウントイ クラーエニスで生まれた時，父King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomondは28歳，母Catherine De Burghは27歳であった。1440年にアイルランドでAnnabelle de Burkeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1466年4月にアイルランドコウントイ クラーエニスで43歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ クラーエニスエニス 1にて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien(이)가 1423년 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 니스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomond(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine De Burgh(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1440년 아일랜드에서 Annabelle de Burke(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1466년 4월 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 니스에서 43세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 클래르 니스 니스 1에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien nasceu em 1423, em Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, seu pai, King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomond, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Catherine De Burgh, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Annabelle de Burke em 1440, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em abril de 1466, em Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, com 43 anos, e foi sepultado em Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien родился в 1423 г. в местности эннис, коунти клар, Ирландия, его отцу по имени King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomond было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine De Burgh, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Annabelle de Burke в 1440 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер апрель 1466 г. в местности эннис, коунти клар, Ирландия в возрасте 43 лет и был похоронен в местности эннис 1, эннис, коунти клар, Ирландия.

sm.from 1459 to 1466: mai le 1459 e o'o I le 1466

es.lifeSummary: Cuando King Tadg an Chomaid O'Brien nació en 1423, en Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, su papá, King Toirdhealbhach Bog O'Brien King of Thomond, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Catherine De Burgh, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Annabelle de Burke en 1440, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en abril de 1466, en Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda, a la edad de 43 años, y fue sepultado en Ennis 1, Ennis, County Clare, Irlanda.
